model: LANCER EVOLUTION X FINAL EDITION MR
prestazioni: Engine: 4B11T (2.0L inline-4 MIVEC turbocharged) - Full forged internals upgrade with Manley 87mm forged crankshaft, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and JE 87.5mm forged pistons (9.0:1 compression) for 35+ psi boost capability. Paired with a Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger (76mm billet compressor wheel, .82 A/R turbine housing) and custom 3.5-inch turbo-back exhaust with Burns Stainless 102mm titanium muffler.

Drivetrain: Transmission reinforcement with PPG Stage 3 gearset (1.92 1st gear) and OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2-way front, 1.5-way rear). Clutch Masters FX500 twin-disc clutch with billet flywheel and upgraded ACT 6-puck sprung hub disc for 500+ ft-lbs torque capacity. Driveshaft Shop 3.5-inch aluminum driveshaft with upgraded CV joints and reinforced axles.

Suspension & Handling: Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (30-way adjustable damping, 20mm adjustable ride height) with Eibach ERS 1400N/m front and 1200N/m rear springs. Cusco Type RS 22mm front sway bar and 20mm rear sway bar. Whiteline adjustable front and rear camber plates with spherical bearings. AP Racing 6-piston front and 4-piston rear brake calipers with 380mm and 350mm two-piece rotors (DBA 5000 Series XG120 compound).
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear bumper) with custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap and exposed carbon fiber weave on the hood. Voltex Type-5 rear wing (1200mm width, 3D carbon fiber construction) with adjustable angle mounts. Custom front splitter with integrated canards (3D-printed carbon fiber) and rear diffuser with titanium supports.

Interior: Recaro SPG-XL carbon fiber bucket seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved) with Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses. Custom roll cage (Chromoly 4130, 6-point with integrated harness bars) by Custom Cages UK. Momo Prototipo Evo steering wheel (350mm diameter, suede) with NRG quick-release hub. Defi BF Advance gauges (boost, oil pressure, EGT) mounted on a custom A-pillar pod (carbon fiber).

Exterior Details: Work Emotion CR Kiwami 2 wheels (18x10.5 +20 front, 18x11 +25 rear) with Toyo R888R tires (265/35/18 front, 295/30/18 rear). Custom titanium lug nuts (McGard 24157) and wheel spacers (H&R 15mm front, 25mm rear). Carbon fiber mirror covers (Seibon) with integrated LED turn signals. Custom LED taillight conversion (Lux H8 V4) with sequential startup animation.
